features.claim: Antigravity provides a panel to monitor background subagents running concurrently.
features.name: Agent Manager Panel
features.quote: Open the Agent Manager Panel to monitor background subagents.

features.claim: Antigravity supports spawning and managing multiple subagents running in the background.
features.name: Background subagents
features.quote: Instantly switches focus to the next subagent awaiting confirmation.

features.claim: Antigravity supports a planning mode that generates multi-turn plans for complex engineering tasks.
features.name: Multi-turn plan generation mode
features.quote: Enable multi-turn plan generation mode for complex engineering tasks.

features.claim: Antigravity allows cloning the current conversation thread into a new parallel session.
features.name: Conversation forking
features.quote: Clone the current conversation thread into a new parallel session.

features.claim: Antigravity supports loading and browsing local and global Agent Skills as plugins.
features.name: Agent Skills
features.quote: Browse loaded local and global Agent Skills.

features.claim: Antigravity includes a built-in MCP server manager for integrating external context providers.
features.name: Model Context Protocol (MCP) server manager
features.quote: Open the Model Context Protocol (MCP) server manager.

features.claim: Antigravity offers configurable global safety presets controlling when the agent prompts for approval before using tools.
features.name: Tool permission presets
features.quote: Global safety presets: "request-review" (prompts for write/bash/web tools), "proceed-in-sandbox" (auto-proceed inside sandbox), "always-proceed" (never prompts), or "strict" (prompts for all non-read tools).

features.claim: Antigravity can restrict all agent-launched local execution commands to OS containment rings.
features.name: Terminal sandbox
features.quote: Restricts all local execution commands launched by agents to OS containment rings.

features.claim: Antigravity provides a dedicated panel for reviewing and approving code artifacts before they are written.
features.name: Artifact Review Panel
features.quote: Code review policy: "asks-for-review" (always prompts before writing code), "agent-decides" (prompts dynamically), or "always-proceed" (never prompts).

features.claim: Antigravity supports pre-flight and post-format script hooks for customizing agent task execution.
features.name: Script hooks
